testCaseName: E2E: Recruiter Selects Candidate, Auto-Rejects Others and Closes Job
testCaseDescription: End-to-end flow: Recruiter creates a job, two candidates apply (status=PENDING), recruiter selects one candidate (status=SELECTED), system auto-rejects remaining applicants (status=REJECTED), job is automatically deactivated, and a new candidate attempting to apply receives 'This position has been filled' error

steps.step: Recruiter creates an active job posting: POST http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
steps.requestBody:
{
  "title": "Backend Engineer",
  "description": "Java Spring Boot developer for cloud applications",
  "location": "Bangalore, India",
  "company": "CloudNine Technologies",
  "salary": "12,00,000 - 18,00,000",
  "type": "FULL_TIME"
}
steps.responseBody:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Job created successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 10,
    "title": "Backend Engineer",
    "description": "Java Spring Boot developer for cloud applications",
    "location": "Bangalore, India",
    "company": "CloudNine Technologies",
    "salary": "12,00,000 - 18,00,000",
    "type": "FULL_TIME",
    "active": true
  }
}

steps.step: Candidate 1 applies for the job (status = PENDING): POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Candidate 2 applies for the same job (status = PENDING): POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Login back as recruiter to manage applications: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Verify both applications are PENDING before selection: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/job/10
Recruiter selects Candidate 1 (Manik) — triggers auto-rejection and job closure: PUT http://localhost:5000/api/applications/21/status?status=SELECTED
Verify Candidate 2 (John Doe) is auto-rejected and job is deactivated: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/job/10
Verify job is no longer active (deactivated): GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs/10
Login as new Candidate 3 and attempt to apply for the closed job: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
